sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id INTEGER, data MAP<STRING, INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, MAP {'key1': 1, 'key2': 2}), (2, MAP {'key1': 5, 'key3': 3});
SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE map_contains(data, 'key2');
UPDATE test_map SET data = map_append(data, 'key4', 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, map_contains(data, 'key3') AS has_key3 FROM test_map;
